---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a scanner issue or incorrect detection
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Cloud Provider**
- [ ] AWS
- [ ] Azure
- [ ] GCP
- [ ] Kubernetes

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**Command run**
```bash
v-19 analyze --aws
```

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual output**
Paste the relevant output here (redact any identity names or account IDs).

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.9]
- v-19 version: [e.g., 1.0.0]

**Additional context**
Any other details.
